overview: Ice Harpy is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ice Abyss, Ice Cavern. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 100 HP, 21 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 3. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Whirlwind at 150% ratio (315 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Air Spin.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Air Spin
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Air Spin. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Air Spin

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
